msg: Apps: scrollable Gmail-styled inbox + GitHub list; web windows use desktop Safari UA
Apps dashboard (Comms + Coding) + WhatsApp/LinkedIn windows; drop Slack
accounts: dedup GitHub rows (keep one per username, canonical+token-bearing)
oauth: run loopback + curl off the main thread (spawn_blocking)
Gmail OAuth: route token exchange + Gmail API through Rust (bypass webview CORS)
Gmail: Google OAuth (desktop loopback) + Gmail connector + agent tool
GitHub: real "commits today" across both accounts (Search API, incl. private)
Agent: reliable output + reasoning-flow graphs + GitHub token wiring
Agent: stream the reply live — kill the dead gap after thinking
